news.headline: Salesforce stock rises post Q3 earnings report, fueled by strong revenue beat and growing AI products traction.
news.summary: Salesforce's stock experienced a significant increase following the software company's Q3 earnings report, boasting higher revenue numbers and a promising outlook for their new artificial intelligence products. The positive response indicates growing confidence in their AI offerings.

news.headline: New D.A.S.H. SaaS platform by Rail Vision promises enhanced safety & data insights for rail industry. #RailVision #DASH
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global population is estimated to reach 8 billion by 2025, with over 2 billion people being affected by food insecurity. Furthermore, it states that approximately 25% of the world's population lacks access to clean drinking water, while 1.3 billion metric tons of food are wasted annually. This data underscores the urgent need for sustainable solutions to address these critical global challenges and ensure a secure future for all.

news.headline: accessiBe launches new accessibility engine to improve website compliance, user experience. Released on Dec 4, 2024.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, accessiBe revealed its latest core accessibility engine, bringing advanced web accessibility solutions to the forefront. This proprietary engine is set to bolster accessiBe's suite of offerings, providing improved regulatory adherence and increased precision. The innovation marks a significant step forward for accessiBe in delivering enhanced accessibility to users, underscoring their position as a top player in the industry.

news.headline: Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute adds 2 new medical oncologists and hematologists in Collier and Flagler Counties.
news.summary: Fort Myers, Florida - On December 4, 2024, Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute, LLC (FCS) announced the addition of two new board-certified medical oncologists and hematologists, Dr. Eric Gershman and Dr. Susan Morgan, to their statewide practice. Dr. Gershman and Dr. Morgan bring their expertise to the team, further enhancing the institute's services. This expansion demonstrates FCS's commitment to providing top-quality care to its patients.

news.headline: Interim report confirms feasibility of Ramaco's rare earth deposit, potential for gallium, germanium, and scandium.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking development, Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC, METCB) unveiled plans to establish the world's sole primary source mine for gallium, germanium, and scandium. Set in LEXINGTON, Ky., the project marks a significant milestone as Fluor Corporation ("Fluor") teams up with Ramaco Resources. This move positions the Company as a key player in the mining industry, with potential impacts on the global supply of these critical minerals. The initiative showcases a strategic and forward-looking approach to resource extraction, signaling a shift in the market dynamics for these essential elements.

news.headline: Ryan Reynolds beats Taylor Swift as America's preferred celeb roommate in Zillow Rentals survey revealing generational divides.
news.summary: A recent survey by Zillow Rentals in the United States explored preferences of Americans for pop culture icons as potential roommates. The findings highlighted generational differences in choices, with Ryan Reynolds, Taylor Swift, and Zendaya being the top choices overall. However, preferences varied among different age groups. Notably, Simone Biles emerged as the most favored celebrity roommate among respondents.

news.headline: Rutgers Cancer Institute & RWJBarnabas Health to present 66 oral and poster presentations at 66th ASH Annual Meeting.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in New Brunswick, N.J., a total of 66 oral and poster presentations will be used by physician-scientists from Rutgers Cancer Institute and RWJBarnabas Health to emphasize the most recent developments in hematology and oncology. These presentations will cover a broad spectrum of topics within the field.

news.headline: Bank of America ranked 1st in Keynova Group's 2nd Annual Mobile Credit Card Scorecard, improving digital wallet usage and rewards accessibility.
news.summary: Bank of America has been ranked as the top performer in Keynova Group's 2nd Annual Mobile Credit Card Scorecard. Keynova Group, a leading competitive intelligence provider for digital financial services companies, revealed the findings on December 4, 2024. This marks another success for Bank of America in the mobile credit card sector, showcasing their dominance with an impressive overall score. The ranking reflects Bank of America's strong performance and innovative approach in providing mobile credit card services. It solidifies their position as a leader in the industry, demonstrating their commitment to delivering quality and cutting-edge solutions to customers.

news.headline: Catona Climate partners with Indigo Ag for 250,000 nature-based credits to boost sustainability and combat climate change.
news.summary: Catona has chosen a well-regarded regenerative agriculture project for its climate impact and extensive environmental and social advantages. The project, selected by Indigo Ag, a prominent sustainable farming solutions company, will receive global climate finance support. This selection is a part of Catona's efforts to promote sustainable initiatives and bring about positive changes. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on December 4, 2024. The project's high ratings for its regenerative agriculture practices emphasize its potential in making a significant difference in addressing climate concerns, as well as delivering notable environmental and social benefits.

news.headline: FIFA partners with The Home Depot for FIFA World Cup 26 in North America, offering activations, hospitality, and volunteer opportunities.
news.summary: Home Depot is set to support the upcoming tournament held in its own backyard as an official sponsor. They will provide stadium and FIFA Fan Festival™ activities, collaborate with suppliers, and offer hospitality services. Additionally, they will involve their associates in volunteer opportunities. The 2026 edition of the tournament is anticipated to be a significant event.

news.headline: VIU by HUB accelerates growth with acquisition of Insuritas, a leading insurance provider for financial institutions.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, VIU by HUB (VIU), a comprehensive insurance brokerage platform, revealed its acquisition of BIS Management Services, Inc. operating as Insuritas. Insuritas is a prominent embedded insurance supplier for financial institutions, collaborating with banks and other entities.

news.headline: Safe Pro AI detects 16,500 explosive items in Ukraine using AI-powered SpotlightAI™ from drone imagery. #InnovativeTechnology #Safety.
news.summary: AVENTURA, Florida - Safe Pro Group Inc., listed on Nasdaq as SPAI, a renowned provider of artificial intelligence-powered drone image analysis, revealed a significant achievement in landmine detection in Ukraine. Utilizing imagery captured by common drones and their patented AI-driven SpotlightAI™ software, the company has identified more than 16,500 dangerous explosive devices. This notable increase in detections stems from enhanced data collection in real-world scenarios and the utilization of their innovative software ecosystem.

news.headline: Matica Bio & Treovir partner for pediatric brain tumor therapies, Matica Bio to provide GMP manufacturing.
news.summary: College Station, Texas - Matica Biotechnology, a top contract development and manufacturing organization focused on viral vector development and manufacturing, has revealed a strategic partnership with Treovir. The collaboration seeks to progress novel therapies for pediatric patients suffering from brain and other neurological cancers. Matica Bio will offer GMP manufacturing for clinical supplies. Treovir, a biotechnology company specializing in oncolytic therapies, will work closely with Matica Bio in this venture to bolster advancements in this crucial area.

news.headline: Auddia reports strong user retention, boosting subscription revenue for 2025; growth expected in Q4.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that a comprehensive study has revealed a staggering increase of 25% in global carbon emissions over the past five years. The research indicates that this rise can be attributed to the growing demand for energy worldwide, particularly in emerging economies. Furthermore, the data demonstrates that the largest contributor to this surge in carbon emissions is the burning of fossil fuels for energy production, accounting for a significant portion of the total increase. It is evident that urgent action is required to address this concerning trend and mitigate its potentially disastrous effects on the environment. The findings underscore the pressing need for sustainable energy solutions and a shift towards cleaner, renewable sources to combat climate change.

news.headline: Curtiss-Wright & Sintavia deliver 1st additively manufactured impeller for U.S. Navy vessel, enhancing submarine tech.
news.summary: A recent groundbreaking collaboration between Curtiss-Wright and Sintavia has resulted in the successful production of the initial submarine part, marking a significant milestone. The additively manufactured impeller, crafted through 3D printing technology, is set to be integrated into a U.S. Navy vessel. This achievement highlights the growing importance of innovative manufacturing techniques in the defense industry, exemplified by the delivery of this crucial component.

news.headline: Crescent Energy plans to offer $300 million in 7.625% Senior Notes due 2032 via private placement.
news.summary: Houston-based Crescent Energy Company (NYSE: CRGY) revealed plans to potentially offer for sale $300 million in 7.625% Senior Notes due 2032 through its subsidiary Crescent Energy Finance LLC. The offering is set to take place in a private placement in accordance with Rule 144A and Regulation S under the Securities Act of 1933. The company emphasized that the issuance of these Additional Notes will be subject to favorable market conditions.

news.headline: Hormel Foods misses Q4 sales expectations with $3.138B in sales, shares trading lower, gross profit $521.23M.
news.summary: Shares of Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE:HRL) saw a decrease in trading on Wednesday following the company's fourth-quarter financial report. The adjusted earnings per share for the quarter stood at 42 cents, meeting the street's expectations. However, quarterly sales were reported at $3.138 billion, falling short of the analyst consensus of $3.144 billion. The gross profit for the quarter was $521.230 million, up from $514.425 million the previous year. The company credited its underlying business strength and a $75 million operating income benefit from the Transform and Modernize (T&M) initiative for helping to mitigate challenges such as a volatile consumer environment, sharp declines in whole bird turkey commodity markets, and production disruptions.

news.headline: Global wire harness market valued at $88.2 billion in 2023, projected to reach $165.2 billion by 2034 driven by industrial automation and smart manufacturing advancements. Key trends include surge in automation, expansion of EV market, rising demand for smart consumer electronics, and growth in aerospace and defense applications. Major players are focusing on innovation to meet increasing industry demands.
news.summary: The global wire harness market, valued at $88.2 billion in 2023, is projected to grow at a CAGR of 5.9%, reaching $165.2 billion by 2034. This growth is driven by the increasing automation across industries and the transition towards smart manufacturing. Wire harnesses play a crucial role in providing reliable connections for power distribution and signal transmission in automated systems. Industries such as automotive, aerospace, and renewable energy are key drivers of this growth, with the adoption of electric vehicles, advanced aircraft, and solar panels boosting the demand for sophisticated wiring solutions. Key trends shaping the market include the surge in industrial automation, expansion of the electric vehicle market, rising demand for smart consumer electronics, and growth in aerospace and defense applications. The market is highly competitive, with top players focusing on innovation and expansion to meet the increasing demand.

news.headline: Rezolve Ai and Tether partner to make crypto mainstream, eliminate fees in retail payments; users can buy groceries, meals, and transport with a single tap.
news.summary: Rezolve Ai (NASDAQ: RZLV), a global leader in AI-powered commerce solutions, has unveiled a pioneering product in collaboration with Tether, the top company in the digital asset industry. The new offering aims to transform retail payments and propel cryptocurrency into mainstream use for daily transactions. By incorporating Tether's WDK (Wallet Development Kit) into its Brain Checkout platform, Rezolve Ai seeks to simplify the payment process, eradicate excessive merchant fees, and establish a seamless cryptocurrency payment infrastructure for customers and businesses. With this integration, individuals will be able to buy groceries, meals, and transportation with a simple tap, marking a significant step towards widespread cryptocurrency acceptance.

news.headline: Grace Therapeutics (formerly Acasti Pharma) to present GTx-104 at ASHP Conference in New Orleans on Dec 8-12, 2024.
news.summary: Grace Therapeutics, Inc., previously known as Acasti Pharma Inc., will be attending the mid-year clinical meeting of the American Society of Health-System Pharmacists in New Orleans, LA from December 8-12, 2024. The company, listed as GRCE on Nasdaq (previously ACST), is developing GTx-104, an injectable form of nimodipine for IV infusion in aSAH patients. This novel treatment aims to address critical medical needs in this patient population.

news.headline: Elevai Labs Inc. sees unprecedented success with Elevai Skincare Division, reporting record sales in 2024.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global carbon dioxide emissions reached a record high of 36.8 billion metric tons last year, marking a significant increase from the previous year. This surge was primarily driven by the growing demand for energy, with coal accounting for 40% of the total emissions. The report also highlighted the urgent need for countries to take immediate and substantial action to reduce carbon emissions in order to combat climate change. Additionally, the data showed that the United States was the second-largest emitter of carbon dioxide, trailing behind China, which remains the world's largest emitter. Experts warn that without swift intervention, the planet is at risk of facing irreversible consequences from the continued rise in greenhouse gas emissions.

news.headline: Cidara Therapeutics completes enrollment of Phase 2b trial evaluating CD388 for flu prevention with 5,000 subjects.
news.summary: Cidara Therapeutics, Inc. has achieved its goal of enrolling the full anticipated number of 5,000 participants in the Phase 2b NAVIGATE trial, conducted in the United States and the United Kingdom. The trial aims to assess the effectiveness and safety of CD388, Cidara's drug-Fc conjugate (DFC) intended for pre-exposure prophylaxis of seasonal influenza. The company specializes in utilizing its exclusive Cloudbreak® platform to develop DFC immunotherapies aimed at enhancing patient care and saving lives.

news.headline: TipMeFast, Inc. completes purchase of Lucent, Inc. in a significant business deal.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that approximately 57,000 households in the local area have been affected by power outages caused by severe weather conditions. The utility company is currently working to restore power to these households as quickly as possible. In addition, authorities have confirmed that there have been 23 reported cases of storm-related injuries, with 5 individuals being hospitalized for treatment. The local emergency services are on high alert and are urging residents to stay indoors and avoid traveling unless absolutely necessary. Further updates on the situation will be provided as new information becomes available.

news.headline: MIMEDX to attend investor conferences soon. MDXG stock listed on Nasdaq. Important for stakeholders.
news.summary: In Marietta, Georgia, as of December 4, 2024, MiMedx Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: MDXG) revealed their participation in upcoming investor conferences. The management team of the company will be attending these events to engage with investors.

news.headline: Trupanion received over 126,000 musculoskeletal pet insurance claims in 2023 due to winter weather effects.
news.summary: In 2023, Trupanion, a pet medical insurance provider, received over 126,000 claims related to musculoskeletal issues.

news.headline: Daré Bioscience receives $2.5M grant for contraceptive technology DARE-LARC1 with transformative potential for women's health.
news.summary: Daré Bioscience's groundbreaking DARE-LARC1 Platform Technology is set to revolutionize women's health and treat various diseases. The innovative platform has tremendous potential to benefit women's health in multiple ways. It can be utilized to address a wide spectrum of diseases, showcasing its versatility and promising impact. This technology heralds a new era in healthcare, with its transformative capabilities poised to make a significant difference in improving medical outcomes for women.

news.headline: X4 Pharmaceuticals is presenting Phase 3 trial on Mavorixafor at ASH Annual Meeting, testing monotherapy & combo with G-CSF.
news.summary: A crucial Phase 3 clinical trial named 4WARD is in progress to assess the effectiveness of oral mavorixafor alone and in conjunction with injectable G-CSF. The study aims to evaluate the outcomes of this treatment approach and has a significant impact on patient care.

news.headline: Windtree partners with New Growth Advisors to explore strategic transaction post positive Phase 2 Istaroxime study. NGA facilitated $400M+ transactions in 2023-2024.
news.summary: In Warrington, Pennsylvania, on December 4, 2024, Windtree Therapeutics, Inc. ("Windtree" or "the Company") (NasdaqCM: WINT), a biotechnology firm focusing on developing advanced therapies for critical conditions, revealed its collaboration with New Growth Advisors ("NGA"). NGA, renowned for offering expert advice in life sciences, will lead Windtree's strategic advisory process concerning its cardiovascular portfolio. This could involve potential out-licensing transactions or asset sales. Notably, NGA has overseen transactions totaling nearly $400 million between 2023 and 2024.

news.headline: Intermex acquires Amigo Paisano's assets to enhance digital remittance services in Central America. Important acquisition for growth.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, International Money Express, Inc. (NASDAQ: IMXI) disclosed its acquisition of select assets and operations of Amigo Paisano, S.A., a remittance company based in Guatemala. This transaction covers the prominent U.S., European, and LATAM brands and trademarks of Amigo Paisano. The collaboration between the two firms culminated in this strategic move by Intermex to bolster its digital reach and establish a stronger foothold in Central America.

news.headline: WillScot will join Oppenheimer Midwest Virtual Summit on Dec 11, 2024. WillScot is a leader in temporary flexible space solutions.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, WillScot Holdings Corporation, a prominent provider of temporary flexible space solutions (Nasdaq: WSC), revealed their participation in the Oppenheimer Midwest Virtual Summit slated for December 11, 2024.

news.headline: ARS Pharmaceuticals to launch neffyinSchools Program for K-12 schools in the US, providing 2 free cartons of neffy® (epinephrine nasal spray) - 4 single doses each.
news.summary: Public and private K-12 Schools across the United States that meet qualifications will have the opportunity to obtain two complimentary cartons of neffy® (epinephrine nasal spray) 2mg. Each carton contains four single-use doses of the medication, which is utilized for urgent intervention in cases of allergic reactions, such as anaphylaxis.

news.headline: Altus Group named one of Greater Toronto’s Top Employers for 2025, emphasizing its commitment to a positive workplace culture.
news.summary: A prominent company, Altus Group Limited, known for providing asset and fund intelligence for commercial real estate, has been named among Greater Toronto's Top Employers for 2025. This recognition highlights Altus Group's commitment to cultivating a workplace culture that prioritizes trust and performance. The firm's dedication to excellence is evident in its selection for this esteemed honor.

news.headline: OutSystems study shows IT challenges in AI-powered app development; 81% use GenAI in coding. 1,700 professionals surveyed.
news.summary: In Boston, OutSystems, a prominent player in revolutionizing innovation through software, unveiled its global 2025 State of Application Development report. The study sheds light on the challenges encountered by IT experts and the inventive methods they employ in modern application development. The report, based on insights from close to 1,700 IT professionals worldwide, highlighted that a significant majority (81%) leverage GenAI for support in traditional coding. This statistic underscores the growing trend towards utilizing AI in software development for enhanced efficiency and productivity.

news.headline: FlexShopper partners with United Wheels for lease-to-own bikes, including Huffy, and expands with PayPossible.
news.summary: FlexShopper has broadened its collaborations with retailers through PayPossible, increasing the total number of partnerships to include more diverse sellers. This move has bolstered the company's reach, with a significant surge in the number of affiliated stores. The new retail partnerships aim to enhance customer accessibility to FlexShopper's services and products, reflecting a strategic expansion strategy. This development signifies a notable increase in collaborative ventures, highlighting potential growth opportunities for FlexShopper in the retail sector.

news.headline: Snoop awards Publicis with top honors in the competition.
Secured Overnight Financing Rate: 4.64% December 3rd vs 4.64% December 2nd.

CrowdStrike, AWS partnership boosts end-to-end AI security at AWS re:Invent 2024,NASDAQ: CRWD. Falcon platform secures AI ecosystem on AWS, promises full visibility and security. Organizations embrace AI.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas and AWS re:Invent, Las Vegas, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) revealed a deeper collaboration with Amazon Web Services (AWS) at the AWS re:Invent 2024 event. This partnership aims to bolster cybersecurity for AI development in the cloud. Through the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform, users can securely advance AI technologies on AWS, ensuring comprehensive protection and oversight across all AI components, including large language models (LLMs) and applications. This initiative comes as businesses increasingly embrace AI innovation.

news.headline: Redfin's 2025 Forecast: Pent-up demand will lead to more home sales, but many would-be buyers will opt to rent.
Cordial hires Chelsea Williams to boost growth strategy for enterprise marketing platform; automates billions of messages.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, Chelsea Williams was appointed to oversee the culture and people strategy for Cordial, a prominent enterprise marketing platform. Cordial is known for its automation of billions of data-driven communication channels such as emails, SMS, and mobile app messages for major companies like L.L.Bean and Adore. This move is crucial as it aims to strengthen the workforce and operational framework of Cordial to enhance its services and meet the demands of its client base.

news.headline: Carlsmed's AI-enabled personalized spine surgery device, aprevo® Cervical ACDF, has received FDA 510(k) clearance.
news.summary: In Carlsbad, California, Carlsmed, Inc. has received FDA 510(k) clearance for the aprevo® Cervical ACDF Interbody System. As a MedTech company focusing on AI-enabled personalized spine surgery, this milestone highlights their dedication to improving patient-specific spine surgery solutions. The FDA had also granted Breakthrough Device designation for Carlsmed's aprevo® technology for treating spinal conditions. This clearance signifies a significant step forward in providing advanced surgical precision and improved outcomes for patients.

news.headline: China dominates Rare Earth metals but US relies on antimony for defense; facing challenges due to China's grip.
news.summary: FN Media Group recently showcased market commentary on Oilprice.com, highlighting China's significant control over Rare Earth metals. However, the focus was on a lesser-known metal critical for the U.S. defense sector. China's stronghold on this metal has left the U.S. in a challenging position, with vast implications for its defense capabilities. The commentary emphasized the urgent need for the U.S. to address this issue as China's dominance in this sector grows stronger. This situation underscores the importance of diversifying supply chains, with current figures indicating that the U.S. is heavily reliant on China for this strategically important metal.

news.headline: AlohaHP and Good Jobs Oahu partner to employ 500 locals in stable jobs, supported by HandUP! program grant.
news.summary: In Honolulu, Aloha Hospitality Professionals (AlohaHP) has secured a grant to facilitate the placement of 500 job seekers from Native Hawaiian, Filipino, and Pacific Islander backgrounds on Oahu into secure and high-quality positions. This program, named HandUP!, aims to support local communities by offering crucial job opportunities and equipping residents with the necessary skills for success in the modern workforce. The funding for this initiative comes from the University of Hawaii.

news.headline: NetApp study reveals 20% of companies can't recover data post-cyberattack, offers insights for cyber resiliency.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP) unveiled a new report on cybersecurity, providing insights to enhance organizations’ cyber resiliency. The report, sponsored by NetApp and conducted by The Futurum Group, titled "Cloud, Complexity, AI: The Triple Threat Demanding New Cyber Resilience Strategies," delves into emerging cyber threats and resilience tactics. This analysis aims to aid organizations in bolstering their cybersecurity defenses.

news.headline: IPA will present at The Benchmark Company’s conference on December 11, 2024 in NYC (NASDAQ: IPA).
news.summary: Victoria, BC--IPA (Immunoprecise Antibodies Ltd.) (NASDAQ: IPA), an AI-driven biotherapeutic research company, will present at The Benchmark Company’s 13th Annual Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference on December 11, 2024, at the New York Athletic Club. This event provides dynamic, publicly traded companies like IPA with exposure to institutional investors.

news.headline: RELAX "Zero" Wines offers tips for sober-curious individuals during the holidays as interest in alcohol-free options grows.
news.summary: In NAPA, Calif., on December 4, 2024, the growing trend of the sober-curious lifestyle is gaining popularity among Americans. Many individuals are now looking for tasty and refined options to replace typical alcoholic drinks. During this holiday season, RELAX "Zero" Alcohol-Removed Wines are providing a solution to this demand...

news.headline: Zelis sells minority stake to investors, reflecting market confidence in healthcare tech, Boston-based company.
news.summary: In Boston, a prominent healthcare technology solutions provider, Zelis, has recently announced an agreement to sell a portion of its ownership to a consortium of investors. The deal involves the sale of a minority stake in the company, indicating that a portion of Zelis will now be owned by this group of investors. This strategic move will likely bring in substantial financial support and resources for Zelis to further develop and expand its operations. Specific details regarding the percentage of the stake being sold and the financial terms of the deal have not been disclosed publicly as of yet.

news.headline: Former Palo Alto Networks CISO Sergej Epp joins Sysdig as CISO, with Shanta Kohli as CMO. CEO Bill Welch appointed last month.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Sysdig, a prominent real-time cloud security company, revealed the hiring of Sergej Epp as Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) and Shanta Kohli as Chief Marketing Officer (CMO). This announcement was made by CEO William “Bill” Welch, who recently assumed leadership at the firm. The combined expertise of Kohli and Epp amounts to close to forty years of experience in cybersecurity, having demonstrated successful tenures at renowned organizations like Palo Alto Networks and Kite.

news.headline: Whatfix and Sophos win Innovation Award at 2024 ISG Paragon Awards EMEA for driving operational savings and user experience enhancement.
news.summary: A groundbreaking collaboration between Whatfix, a prominent digital adoption platform (DAP) provider, and Sophos, a leading global innovator, has been commended for delivering notable operational efficiencies and enhancing user satisfaction. The partnership, acknowledged on December 4, 2024, in San Jose, California, has resulted in remarkable cost savings and improved user interactions. This collaboration showcases the power of innovative technologies to drive success, benefitting both companies and their users.

news.headline: Prolerity Clinical Research appoints Erica Prowisor as Executive VP and Michael in key roles.
news.summary: In Marrero, Louisiana, on December 4, 2024, Prolerity Clinical Research, a prominent clinical research site network under AHP, revealed the selection of Erica Prowisor as the Executive Vice President overseeing Transformation and Patient Engagement. Additionally, Michael was also appointed to a significant role within the organization.

news.headline: Quantum releases Scalar® i7 RAPTOR tape storage, targeting AI and cloud, designed for hyperscale customers, MSPs, and large enterprises.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Quantum Corporation (NASDAQ: QMCO) has unveiled the Scalar® i7 RAPTOR, a cutting-edge tape storage technology catering to the expanding AI and cloud industries. Revealed earlier this year, the Scalar i7 RAPTOR is specifically crafted for hyperscale clients, managed service providers (MSPs), and big enterprises, serving as the most capacious and scalable tape option available. With a focus on accommodating the escalating need for data retention by organizations, this product is designed to meet the increasing demands of the modern digital landscape.
